samples.target_compile_errors:
error[E0277]: the type `[{integer}]` cannot be indexed by `*const i32`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gemma-3-12b/expressions/add_op_c8/sample_001/target.rs:5:17
  |
5 |     let p2 = &a[(p0 as *const i32).offset(6) as *const i32];
  |                 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ slice indices are of type `usize` or ranges of `usize`
  |
  = help: the trait `SliceIndex<[{integer}]>` is not implemented for `*const i32`
  = help: the following other types implement trait `SliceIndex<T>`:
            `usize` implements `SliceIndex<ByteStr>`
            `usize` implements `SliceIndex<[T]>`
  = note: required for `[{integer}]` to implement `Index<*const i32>`
  = note: 1 redundant requirement hidden
  = note: required for `[{integer}; 5]` to implement `Index<*const i32>`
